text: Operational and technology risks stem from the company's concentrated business model focused on AI and data center solutions. According to the company description, NVIDIA's Compute & Networking segment provides Data Center platforms and systems for AI, HPC, and accelerated computing, indicating significant dependence on continued AI infrastructure demand [CHUNK_ID: cd7d7972-79b5-433f-b378-e23ffc087d85]. The company employs 36,000 full-time employees and incurred R&D expenses of $5,512,000,000 in Q4 (8.09% of revenue), suggesting ongoing need to maintain technological leadership through substantial investment [CHUNK_ID: 0571a4ea-26e6-49fc-b4d5-1f2654462e02, CHUNK_ID: 1562353d-db39-4a2f-b994-c550365403ac, CALC_ID: 7d0701ad-9c93-41dc-a668-c80da89edf75]. Platform shifts or obsolescence in AI chip architecture could materially impact the business given this focused product portfolio.

citations.text_snippet: NVIDIA Corporation provides graphics, and compute and networking solutions in the United States, Taiwan, China, and internationally.
